rationale: The code faithfully implements Clotho Task 4a against the frozen v15 scope, honoring AM-40 (explicit PACKAGE_ROOTS and PACKAGE_ROOTS_EXCLUDE) and AM-41 (strictly closed and enforced lexical source profile with correct fail-closed deterministic semantics for all out-of-profile patterns b1-b6). The shared D33 classifier and resolver correctly verify original path chains before alias collapse and properly capture accepted relative loads. The git and code weavers follow counted-source restrictions, and the test scripts stringently cover failures, bounds, schemas, and equality checks.
